## name: Bug Report about: Report a bug to help us improve title: "[Bug] Short summary of the bug - Component" labels: bug assignees: ""

## Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
1. Click on '...'
1. Scroll down to '...'
1. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened (include error messages).

## Diagnostics

Run `python -m octave_kernel.check` and paste the output here.

## Screenshots/Videos

Add screenshots or videos to help explain the problem.

## Severity/Priority

[Low / Medium / High / Critical]
